name: My Pork Veal and Egg Pie
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------PASTRY-----------------------------------
Any standard pastry recipe
Cream
Cut meat into 1-inch cubes, mix with Worcestershire sauce and seasonings.
Make pastry and roll out to 1/4-inch thin. Line a 9x5 loaf pan. Spoon half of the meat mixture into the shell. Place 4 eggs in a line down the center and top with remaining meat mixture. Top with a crust, and decorate as desired. Make 2 holes to allow steam to vent and for later additions. Brush pastry with cream and bake at 375°F about 20 minutes. Reduce heat to 250°F and bake for 1-1/2 hours longer until meat is tender. Mix gelatin according to package directions with bouillon. Pour into the holes in the top of the lid until you can see the liquid. Top up until it no longer goes down. Allow to cool, then store in the refrigerator. Serve in half-inch slices as an appetizer.
